oneRm.subtitle: Enter your best recent set. Your tracked e1RM over time is in Trends.
oneRm.reliabilityNote: Estimates are least reliable above ~10 reps. The app logs e1RM with Epley.
oneRm.emptyPrompt: Enter a weight and rep count to estimate your max.

routineHistory.emptyState: No sessions logged for this routine yet.

measurements.subtitle: Track waist, chest, arms, and more over time — free, local, and private.
measurements.noEntriesYet: No entries yet for {{metric}}. Log one above to start a trend.

trends.emptyBody: Start logging workouts to see your progress trends here.

recoveryCode.copyUnavailableBody: Install expo-clipboard (npx expo install expo-clipboard) to enable copy, or write the code down manually.
recoveryCode.confirmBody: Check the box to confirm you have saved your recovery code.
recoveryCode.title: Recovery code
recoveryCode.noCodeBody:
No recovery code is waiting to be displayed.

A new recovery code is only generated when your first encrypted backup is created. Back up your data from the Export screen to generate one.
recoveryCode.warningTitle: This is the only way to restore your data on a new platform.
recoveryCode.warningBody:
We cannot recover this code. If you lose it and also lose access to this device, your encrypted backup cannot be decrypted — your data will be unrecoverable.

Write it down or store it in a password manager before continuing.
recoveryCode.savedCheckboxA11y: I have saved my recovery code
recoveryCode.savedCheckboxLabel: I have saved my recovery code somewhere safe.
recoveryCode.confirmButtonA11y: Confirm I have saved the recovery code
recoveryCode.footerNote: Your backup is encrypted on this device before upload. We cannot read your data or recover this code.

progressPhotos.dragHint: Drag the divider to compare — left: {{left}}, right: {{right}}
progressPhotos.notePlaceholder: e.g. after 4 weeks of the cut
progressPhotos.deleteBody: This permanently deletes the {{pose}} photo from {{date}}. This cannot be undone.
progressPhotos.subtitle: Your photos never leave your phone — private, on-device, always.
progressPhotos.pickerUnavailable: Photo capture needs an app update to enable it on this build.
progressPhotos.tapSecondPhoto: Tap a second photo to compare
progressPhotos.emptyState: No progress photos yet. Take or import your first one above.

progress.bodyMeasurementsSubtitle: Waist, chest, arms, and more — track trends over time
progress.progressPhotosSubtitle: Private, on-device — never leaves your phone
progress.noPrsYet: No sets logged yet. Start lifting to see your PRs!
progress.tenPctWarningA11y: 10% rule warning: your mileage jumped more than 10% this week. Consider backing off to reduce injury risk.
progress.tenPctWarningBody: Increasing weekly mileage by more than 10% raises injury risk. Consider an easier week.
progress.paceNote: Lower is faster — upward trend means you are getting quicker

workoutHistory.errorState: Could not load your workout history.
workoutHistory.emptyBody: Start logging to see your history here.

planAdjust.updateCalendarBody: This plan is on your calendar. Replace the scheduled days with the new plan, or keep your current schedule?
planAdjust.noActivePlan: No active plan to adjust. Generate a plan first, then request changes.
planAdjust.title: Request changes
planAdjust.subtitle: Adjust a few things — we rebuild your plan instantly. No need to redo the survey.
planAdjust.noChangesYet: No changes yet — adjust an option above.

planSurvey.upsellTitle: Plan generation is a Pro feature
planSurvey.upsellBody: The deep plan builder asks about your goal, experience, schedule, split preference, injuries and equipment, then builds a fully periodised training plan on-device — tuned to how close to failure you want to train, how fast to progress, and how often to deload.
planSurvey.upsellFeature1: ✓  Split preference, or trial three splits
planSurvey.genError: Could not build a plan from these answers. Please review and try again.
planSurvey.planSavedBody: Add it to your calendar now so we can schedule your training days?
planSurvey.replaceScheduleBody: You already have a training schedule. Replace it with this plan, or keep your current one?
planSurvey.goalSubtitle: This shapes volume, intensity and how the plan periodises.
planSurvey.sportSubtitle: Season phase drives your in/off-season loading.
planSurvey.gameDaySubtitle: Anchors your heavy/light sessions around match day.
planSurvey.experienceSubtitle: Calibrates how close to failure the plan pushes you.
planSurvey.daysPerWeekSubtitle: How many sessions can you commit to?
planSurvey.weekdaysSubtitle: Maps sessions onto real days instead of Day 1, Day 2…
planSurvey.splitSubtitle: Not sure? Pick “I don't know” and we'll trial all three.
planSurvey.equipmentSubtitle: We only prescribe what you can actually use. Skip for a full gym.
planSurvey.equipmentEmptyHint: None selected — the engine assumes a full gym.
planSurvey.prioritiesSubtitle: Extra volume and exercise bias toward what you pick.
planSurvey.injuriesSubtitle: We leave out risky movements and prefer safer swaps.
planSurvey.bestLiftsSubtitle: Estimated 1RMs let us prescribe exact loads ({{unit}}).
planSurvey.dobSubtitle: Used only to tune recovery defaults.
planSurvey.meetSubtitle: Have a meet coming up? Enter weeks out and target lifts.
planSurvey.meetHint: Your best-lift 1RMs (previous step) become opener / 2nd / 3rd attempt suggestions.
planSurvey.trialNote: We'll track your three trial blocks. Adopt any split when its block ends.
planSurvey.savePlanNote: Saving adds this plan to your library; you can add it to your calendar next.

templates.programAddedBody: {{name}} is on your schedule. Open the schedule screen to set timing.
templates.couldNotAddBody: Something went wrong saving this program. Please try again.
templates.replaceScheduleBodyProgram: You already have a training schedule. Replace it with this program, or keep your current one?
templates.loadError: Could not load templates. Check your connection and try again.
templates.bundledDetailHint: Tap a day to start it in the stepper. No barbell back squat or conventional deadlift — beginner-safe swaps only.

workoutDay.deleteSetBody: Remove this set? This cannot be undone.
workoutDay.tapEditHint: Tap a set to edit · long-press to delete.
workoutDay.restDayBody: Recovery is part of the programme. Your streak is protected.
workoutDay.emptyState: No workout logged for this day.
workoutDay.setEditA11y: Set {{number}}. Tap to edit, long-press to delete.

onboarding.step1Explanation: This is the name shown on your home screen and profile. You can change it any time in Settings.
onboarding.leaveAsHint: Leave it as “{{name}}” or pick something else.
onboarding.step2Explanation: We use this to compare you fairly against athletes with similar physiology. It affects your percentile ranking only.
onboarding.streakNote: Even a 5-minute session counts. Rest days don't break your streak — only missing sessions in a row does.
onboarding.step3Explanation: We use this to rank you against athletes in the same discipline.
onboarding.step4Heading: What is your main training goal?
onboarding.step4Explanation: The Training Engine uses this to prioritise your programme structure.
onboarding.step5Explanation: How many training sessions can you commit to each week?
onboarding.step5Hint: The engine defaults to 3 sessions if you skip this.
onboarding.step6Explanation: Your plan will be scaled to fit your available time.
onboarding.step7Explanation: Select everything available to you. The engine only prescribes exercises you can actually do.
onboarding.step7Hint: Select at least one, or skip to use the full gym default.
onboarding.step8Heading: Do you have a goal weight? (optional)
onboarding.step8Explanation: If you have a target body weight in mind, we factor this into your programme. Skip if you prefer not to set one.
onboarding.step9Heading: Are you in or out of season?
onboarding.step9Explanation: Your phase affects how the engine balances training load and recovery.
onboarding.themeExplanation: Pick the look that feels right. You can change it any time in Settings → Appearance.
onboarding.healthKitExplanation: Allow Peak Fettle to read your activity and health data for smarter plan recommendations and automatic workout import.
onboarding.privacyNote: Your selections are used only to calculate your percentile rank. You can update these any time in Settings.

trainingSurvey.screenSubtitle: These answers shape every plan the Training Engine builds for you. Update them any time — your next plan reflects the change.
trainingSurvey.goalSubtitle: What are you optimising for right now?
trainingSurvey.experienceSubtitle: How long have you been training consistently?
trainingSurvey.expBeginnerSubtitle: New, or returning after a long break (< 1 yr)
trainingSurvey.expIntermediateSubtitle: Consistent for 1–3 years; linear gains slowing
trainingSurvey.focusSubtitle: Which discipline should the plan be built around?
trainingSurvey.sessionsSubtitle: How many training sessions can you commit to?
trainingSurvey.sessionsHint: Engine defaults to 3 sessions if not set.
trainingSurvey.lengthSubtitle: How long is each training session?
trainingSurvey.equipmentSubtitle: The engine only prescribes exercises you can actually perform.
trainingSurvey.equipmentEmptyHint: None selected — engine uses full gym default.
trainingSurvey.goalWeightSubtitle: Target body weight, if applicable. Leave blank to skip.
trainingSurvey.seasonSubtitle: Your competitive phase affects how the engine balances load and recovery.
trainingSurvey.trainingDaysSubtitle: Pick the weekdays that suit you and your plan maps onto real days ("Mon – Push") instead of generic "Day 1". Optional — skip to keep it generic.
trainingSurvey.trainingDaysEmptyHint: None selected — sessions are labelled Day 1, Day 2, …
trainingSurvey.injuriesSubtitle: We leave out movements that could aggravate these and pick safer alternatives. Select any that apply — skip if none.
trainingSurvey.prioritiesSubtitle: Want to bring up specific areas? The plan leans extra volume and exercise choice toward what you pick. Optional.
trainingSurvey.prioritiesEmptyHint: None selected — balanced across the whole body.
trainingSurvey.bodyweightSubtitle: Helps set sensible starting loads and recovery. Leave blank to skip.
trainingSurvey.ageSubtitle: Used only to tune recovery defaults. Leave blank to skip.
trainingSurvey.dobFullA11y: Date of birth, year month day
